# Deterministic trace for CSC3060 task 1 and task 2
# Target geometry: L1=32KB 8-way 64B, L2=128KB 8-way 64B
# Phase 1: hot set, Phase 2: L1 conflict but L2 fit, Phase 3: dirty write-back
w 0x10000140
w 0x10000180
w 0x100001c0
w 0x10000200
r 0x10000140
r 0x10000180
r 0x100001c0
r 0x10000200
r 0x10000140
r 0x10000180
r 0x100001c0
r 0x10000200
r 0x10000140
r 0x10000180
r 0x100001c0
r 0x10000200
r 0x1000c0c0
r 0x1000d0c0
r 0x1000e0c0
r 0x1000f0c0
r 0x100100c0
r 0x100110c0
r 0x100120c0
r 0x100130c0
r 0x100140c0
r 0x100150c0
r 0x1000c0c0
r 0x1000d0c0
r 0x1000e0c0
r 0x1000f0c0
r 0x100100c0
r 0x100110c0
r 0x100120c0
r 0x100130c0
